attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
,SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT

,SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT

,SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT

,SK_TRX_ID_INT

,AR_TRX_KEY

,AR_TRX_LINE_KEY

,BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY

,GL_DT

,BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD

,BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD
,ACCT_CLASS_CD

,SALES_ORDER_KEY

,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

,PRDT_INVOICED_QTY

,REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD

,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY

,BK_COMPANY_CD

,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY

,SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT

,CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE

,GL_POSTED_DT

,PRODUCT_KEY

,BK_DEAL_ID

,MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD
,TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD

,SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
,ELEMENT_TYPE_CD

,BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT

,BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY
,TRX_SRC_CD

,OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,ATTRIBUTION_CD

,BK_WEB_ORDER_ID

,SS_CD

,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD

,RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT

,RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT
,RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT

,RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT

,COALESCE(BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,-9999) AS BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT /*agannava: TnC POS data inclusion*/
,BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD
,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT
,BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT
,EDW_CREATE_DTM

,EDW_CREATE_USER

,EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,EDW_UPDATE_USER
,REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME

,NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,POB_TYPE_CD          /*START:ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY20 SWSS*/

,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME

,ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT

,ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT

,TRX_CLASS_CD

,SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID

,SUBSCRIPTION_CD

,BK_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM

,RESIDUAL_TRX_TYPE_CD
,SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY
,END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY
,SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY    /*END*/
,BUNDLE_TYPE_CD/* ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,COALESCE(REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD
,COALESCE(RU_CREDIT_TYPE_PROGRAM_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_CREDIT_TYPE_PROGRAM_NAME
,COALESCE(REBATE_PRGRM_BUSINESS_TRACK_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS REBATE_PRGRM_BUSINESS_TRACK_NAME
,REBATE_PRGRM_BUSINESS_SUB_TRACK_NAME 
,DV_BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY
FROM
$$WORKDB.W_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI WROL
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
WHERE NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = WROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY)
